text: There is a silence here that feels almost heavy, as if the spaces themselves are holding secrets. The darkness unsettles me slightly, making me acutely aware of my presence amid the echo of empty rooms and flickering lights. A sense of curiosity mingles with caution—I wonder about the purposes these rooms once fulfilled, and if, in some sense, my being here now completes part of their story. I feel both isolated and strangely watched, as if the inanimate surroundings are attending to my quiet exploration.
